items.description: ResearchPilot is a Agentic  RAG Chatbot built with LangGraph, LangChain, and Streamlit. Users upload documents then ask questions about them. The system routes each query intelligently — answering directly from paper content, searching the web for current developments, or verifying whether a claim from a paper has been superseded by newer research.
